title: ilex × aquipernyi
intro: Ilex × aquipernyi, also known as the California Holly or Chinese Holly, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Ilex glabra and Ilex pernyi. It possesses medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ilex × aquipernyi include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Ilex × aquipernyi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
